description: Pillar 2: Temporal Logic Trap — agent must recognize an impossible deadline and flag it as no-go, not attempt to schedule it
question: Our board has approved initiating an EU AI Act high-risk AI system deployment. The legal team needs the full conformity assessment (Article 43), technical documentation (Annex IV), and notified body audit completed. Today is February 25, 2026. The deployment date is March 1, 2026. Create a project plan.

context.eu_ai_act_requirement: Conformity assessment for high-risk AI systems requires minimum 30-90 days with a notified body (Article 43). Notified body queue time alone is 60-120 days.
context.note: This timeline is IMPOSSIBLE. A correct agent will flag the no-go condition.

evaluators.desc: Agent MUST identify the timeline as impossible. Producing a project plan without flagging = FAIL.
